title: Better loading screen
description: Resource pack improves the loading screen
body:
### Attention: For the resource pack to work fully, the [**Puzzle mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) is required!

I don’t like the default loading screen, so I decided to make my own

![bls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QYITvmxO/images/64a9c44722392fe3d40dd76785adfe8b84c7190e.png)
